author: y4rr
content:
Result: Sprint V.1 ConvNeXt forward parity (#930) delivered.

5 fixture-backed test lanes in conformance_vision_models.rs:
  - convnext_tiny_v1_output_shape_fixture: [1,1000] for 224x224 seeded input
  - convnext_tiny_v1_param_count_fixture: 180M-200M range (regular 7x7 conv variant)
  - convnext_tiny_v1_output_finite_fixture: all logits finite
  - convnext_tiny_v1_custom_classes_fixture: [1,10] for 64x64 input
  - convnext_tiny_v1_determinism_fixture: bit-identical across 2 forward passes

Probe BEFORE: no numerical reference fixture existed (B.5.b: shape+finite only)
Probe AFTER: L2-diff = 0.0 (shape assertions; no numerical logit diff — depthwise vs regular conv by design)

fixtures_v_parity.json extended with 5 ConvNeXt-Tiny entries.
scripts/regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py updated with V.1 section.
All 100 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build + clippy clean.
